postPaywall.title: Your path is ready
postPaywall.commitmentText: I have named what I am building, and I will keep showing up for it when doubt shows up. I commit to giving my rebrand my attention and my follow-through. What I am plotting deserves more than a passing thought; it deserves my full yes.
simsLines: Making it official — membership locked in.
Building your four-board workspace from your setup…
Setting up your starter boards and plan layout…
postPaywall.toastActivateFailedIos: Purchase completed, but we could not activate your plan yet. Try again from subscriptions.
postPaywall.toastActivateFailedAndroid: Purchase completed, but we could not activate your plan yet. Please try again.
postPaywall.toastSetupSnag: We hit a snag finishing setup. Taking you to the dashboard…

legacyIos.subtitle: Choose a weekly plan to claim your free trial.
legacyIos.fallbackBody: Tap Try again, or go back to sign up and tap Continue.
legacyIos.errorNotIosApp: Subscriptions are only available in the iOS app.
legacyIos.errorSignInAgain: Sign in again, then open subscription.
legacyIos.errorNoSession: No active session. Sign out, sign in, then tap Continue.
legacyIos.errorOpenFromSignup: Open subscription from the app after sign up.
legacyIos.errorSkippedDetail: Use Continue on the sign-up screen, or open Account from Settings.
legacyIos.errorPersist: Something went wrong. Copy debug log from Safari if this persists.
legacyIos.restoreOnlyIos: Restore is only available in the iOS app.

legacyAndroid.title: Unlock Palette Plotting Pro Today.
legacyAndroid.subtitle: Tap Continue to confirm your plan.
legacyAndroid.fallbackBody: Tap Try again, or go back to sign up and tap Continue.
legacyAndroid.errorNotAndroidApp: Subscriptions are only available in the Android app.
legacyAndroid.errorSignInAgain: Sign in again, then open subscription.
legacyAndroid.errorNoSession: No active session. Sign out, sign in, then tap Continue.
legacyAndroid.errorOpenFromSignup: Open subscription from the app after sign up.
legacyAndroid.errorSkippedDetail: Use Continue on the sign-up screen, or open Account from Settings.

flow.subscriptionAlreadyOpening: Subscription is already opening — wait a few seconds, then try again.
flow.subscriptionScreenMayBeOpening: A subscription screen may still be opening. Wait a few seconds, then try again. If nothing changes, force-quit the app and reopen.
flow.openingSubscriptionsTimedOut: Opening subscriptions timed out. Force-quit the app, reopen, and tap Continue again.
flow.signInRequiredBeforeSubscribing: Sign in is required before subscribing.

webWrapper.checkoutClosed: Checkout closed. You can subscribe anytime.
webWrapper.notConfigured: Web checkout is not configured yet. Please try again later.

emailCollection.title: Let's Get Started
emailCollection.emailTaken: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.
emailCollection.usernameTaken: This username is already taken. Please choose another.
emailCollection.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
emailCollection.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
emailCollection.needPassword: Please enter a password with at least 8 characters
emailCollection.acceptTerms: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
emailCollection.verifyEmailBlocked: Account created, but sign-in is blocked. Please verify your email, then sign in.
emailCollection.subscriptionError: Could not open subscription options. Try again in a moment.
emailCollection.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
emailCollection.appNotificationsConsent: I consent to app notifications (optional). New tools, promotions and app news. Opt out in Settings → Notification preferences.
emailCollection.emailMarketingConsent: I consent to email marketing communications (optional, separate from transactional emails minimally required). Opt out in settings.
emailCollection.smsMarketingConsent: I consent to SMS marketing communications (optional). Opt out in settings. Message and data rates may apply.

errors.billingUnavailable: Billing unavailable; RevenueCat paywall UI is not used on this iOS version.
errors.noOfferings: No offerings in RevenueCat. Add a default offering and paywall in the dashboard.
errors.webNotConfigured: RevenueCat Web is not configured (missing API key).

paymentProcessing.title: Processing Payment
paymentProcessing.subtitle: Please wait while we confirm your payment. This usually takes a few seconds.
paymentProcessing.missingInfo: Missing payment information. Please restart onboarding.
paymentProcessing.verificationSlow: Payment verification is taking longer than expected. Please contact support.
paymentProcessing.verificationFailed: Unable to verify payment. Please contact support.
